Now the way that this works is unfortunately, obviously it costs tickets to go to the 10X event. And so I did a deal with Grant and we figured out a thing where basically if you wanna come to my event, so I do an event every year called Funnel Hacking Live. We have about 3,500 entrepreneurs who come to that event and it's an amazing time. It's, you learn about funnels and webinars and driving traffic and a whole bunch of really cool things. If you get a ticket to the Funnel Hacking Live event, Grant has given me permission to give you two tickets to the 10X event for free. So that can be for you, for a spouse, for a business partner, for a friend. But basically if you get a ticket to Funnel Hacking Live, you're gonna be getting two tickets to the 10X event, which is insane. So you're getting basically three tickets to an event for the price of one. And so if you're interested in that, we'd love to have you. It'll give you all the information about when it's happening, where, all that kind of information.
